news.title: Trump: 'İran ile anlaşma imzalandı, detayları çok yakında açıklanacak'

news.title: Suriye'de Esad dönemiyle bağlantılı isimlerin 'hesap vermesi' için eylemler
news.summary: Suriye'nin farklı bölgelerinde 12-14 Haziran'da Beşar Esad yönetimiyle bağlantılı yetkililerin hesap vermesi ve bulundukları bölgelerden sürülmeleri çağrısıyla protestolar düzenlendi.

news.title: Netanyahu: 'Mücadele bitmedi, tetikte olmalıyız'

news.title: Bowen: Iran deal ends Trump's war that revealed limit of US dominance
news.summary: The deal to end fighting and re-open the Strait of Hormuz leaves the sides where they were 24 hours before the war - only with thousands now dead.

news.title: Norwegian crown princess's son found guilty of two counts of rape
news.summary: Marius Borg Høiby, the 29-year-old son of Norway's Crown Princess Mette Marit, has been sentenced to four years in jail.

news.title: Brazil woman dies after rope-jumping instructors fail to attach cord
news.summary: Three men have been arrested after instructors failed to attach a rope to her before helping her jump from a bridge.

news.title: South African jazz legend Abdullah Ibrahim dies at 91
news.summary: Ibrahim helped define a genre of South African jazz music in a career that spanned eight decades.

news.title: MSF staff abused Sudanese refugees in sex-for-food scandal
news.summary: Some victims said they chose not to speak out because they feared staff would cut off access to aid.

news.title: 'Spider-Man of Yemen' dies falling into volcanic crater
news.summary: Al-Qaqa Ibn Antar had been attempting to climb its walls without safety equipment when he fell in, local authorities say.

news.title: Trump touts Iran deal and Ukraine ambition as he arrives at G7
news.summary: Amid G7 tensions, Trump says Iran agreement is a step towards peace in the Middle East and beyond.

news.title: Netanyahu says Israel won’t leave occupied land in Lebanon
news.summary: Israel's occupation of territory in Lebanon and Syria will continue, PM Netanyahu said, despite US deal with Iran.

news.title: What Israeli leaders are saying about US-Iran ‘peace deal’
news.summary: Israel’s political leaders, including Itamar Ben-Gvir and Bezalel Smotrich, have reacted to the US-Iran agreement.

news.title: California Governor Newsom says US Department of Justice investigating him
news.summary: Newsom says he and wife targeted because he is considering running for president in 2028; DOJ has not confirmed probe.

news.title: Russian supersonic bomber crashes in Siberia during training exercise
news.summary: A Russian Tu-22M3 strategic bomber crashed in Siberia’s Irkutsk region during a training flight.

news.title: Dutch court sentences Syrian to 26 years for torturing for al-Assad
news.summary: The sentence is the latest in a series of European cases against Syrians since Bashar al-Assad was overthrown in 2024.

news.title: Soccer Edition: Watch World Cup highlights from across the NPR Network
news.summary: The 2026 World Cup is playing out in communities across the country. Journalists from NPR and its member stations are in your city — capturing the excitement and asking the important questions.

news.title: As the U.S. turns 250, this historian has blunt advice: 'America has to grow up'
news.summary: In America, U.S.A., Princeton historian Eddie Glaude Jr. looks at the country through the lens of its previous anniversaries and centennials. "The divided soul of the nation is in full view," he says.

news.title: Former American businessman detained in Myanmar after alleged financial misconduct
news.summary: Adam Castillo, founder of AGS Myanmar, was detained Thursday at Yangon International Airport. The U.S. State Department is aware of a reported detention but hasn't commented further.

news.title: As Luigi Mangione's lawyers head to court, support grows for the accused 'vigilante'
news.summary: Luigi Mangione's legal team is back in court in New York City this week for a key pretrial hearing. He's accused of stalking and killing an insurance CEO. Donors have given $1.5 million to support his defense.

news.title: Trump announces deal to end war in Iran. And, how to stay safe in deadly heat
news.summary: Trump says a deal has been reached to end the war between the U.S. and Iran. Plus, this is what extreme temperatures do to the human body — and how you can keep yourself safe.

news.title: Britain will ban under-16s from social media apps, including TikTok and YouTube
news.summary: The ban will apply to platforms including Snapchat, TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook and X. The move makes the U.K. part of a growing global movement to tighten online safety for children.

facts.text: Honey never spoils — edible honey has been found in ancient tombs.
A day on Venus is longer than its year.
Bananas are berries; strawberries are not.
